title: US 30-Year Yield Raises Alarm in Longest Run Above 5% Since 2007
title_cn: 美国30年期国债收益率创下2007年以来最长5%以上的纪录
summary: The US 30-year bond yield has held above 5% for the longest stretch since the dawn of the financial crisis, echoing investor concerns about a growing debt pile and sticky inflation.

title: Stocks Churn Before Big-Tech Earnings as Oil Jumps: Markets Wrap
title_cn: 随着石油价格上涨，股市在大型科技公司盈利之前出现波动：市场结束
summary: Wall Street investors bracing for the start of the big-tech earnings season sent stocks wavering while worries about an escalation of the Iran war boosted oil prices.

title: Galaxy Digital Seeks $3.5 Billion Debt for Texas Data Center
title_cn: Galaxy Digital 为德克萨斯州数据中心寻求 35 亿美元债务
summary: Galaxy Digital Inc. is planning to raise about $3.5 billion from a debut junk-bond sale to fund a data center tied to CoreWeave Inc., extending AI borrowing’s push into the riskier corners of the US credit market.

title: Financial Services Sector Seen as Focus for Activist Campaigns
title_cn: 金融服务业被视为维权运动的焦点
summary: Financial services companies are attracting activist investors who see them as generating cash that could be paid out to investors, said Paul Weiss’ Carmen Lu.

title: Kuwait Sells $6 Billion of Bonds Despite Iran Strikes
title_cn: 尽管伊朗发动袭击，科威特仍出售 60 亿美元债券
summary: Kuwait raised $6 billion from a three-part dollar bond sale on Wednesday, highlighting resilient demand for the OPEC member’s debt even as it comes under daily missile and drone attacks from Iran.

title: Tesla Stock at ‘Inflection Point’ as Traders Seek AI Credibility
title_cn: 交易员寻求人工智能可信度，特斯拉股价处于“拐点”
summary: As Tesla Inc. is set to report results that many expect will set the tone for the company’s artificial-intelligence ambitions, analysts are scouring charts for clues on where the stock is headed.

title: Latest Oil Market News and Analysis for July 22
title_cn: 7 月 22 日最新石油市场新闻和分析
summary: Oil briefly spiked above $95, extending this month’s price jump to around 30%, as the US and Iran played down the prospect of peace talks and disruptions to global supplies continued to mount.

title: Venezuela Oil: Batistas’ Fluxus Clinches Stake in PDVSA Joint Venture
title_cn: 委内瑞拉石油：Batistas 的 Fluxus 入股 PDVSA 合资企业
summary: Brazil’s billionaire Batista brothers have acquired a stake in an oil production project in Venezuela, the latest deal to emerge in a country that the Trump administration is vowing to reinvigorate after years of sanctions.

title: Paulson-Backed NovaGold Strikes Deal for Full Ownership of Alaska Mine
title_cn: 保尔森支持的 NovaGold 达成阿拉斯加矿山完全所有权协议
summary: NovaGold Resources Inc., a company backed by hedge-fund billionaire John Paulson, struck a deal to obtain full ownership of the Donlin Gold project in Alaska in a move to control one of the largest undeveloped gold mines.

title: Vale Elects Ollie Chairman After Weeks of Governance Turmoil
title_cn: 经过数周的治理动荡后，淡水河谷选举奥利为董事长
summary: Vale SA shareholders elected Manuel Lino Silva de Sousa Oliveira as chairman on Wednesday, concluding weeks of boardroom turmoil sparked by an effort from one of the Brazilian mining giant’s largest investors to reshape the company’s leadership.

title: Dassault Talks With France on Jet Alternative After Airbus Flop
title_cn: 空客失败后，达索与法国就喷气式飞机替代方案进行谈判
summary: France’s Dassault Aviation SA is in talks with French authorities to develop an alternative for the FCAS fighter jet project that was aborted after failed attempts with Airbus SE.

title: US Goes All-In on Diesel Production Amid Growing Global Shortage
title_cn: 在全球日益短缺的情况下，美国全力投入柴油生产
summary: US refiners are ramping up diesel production to near-record levels, bucking seasonal trends as the Russia and Iran wars trigger a global supply crunch.

title: Warsh Confuses Traders, Makes Them Guess Next Week’s Rate Move
title_cn: 沃什让交易者感到困惑，让他们猜测下周的利率走势
summary: The Kevin Warsh Fed is already putting its stamp on financial markets: Just days before the central bank’s next meeting, traders are still split on whether it’s going to raise interest rates or not.

title: S&P 500 Fluctuates as Traders Brace for Alphabet, Tesla Results
title_cn: 交易员等待 Alphabet、特斯拉业绩，标普 500 指数波动
summary: US stocks swung between small gains and losses after chipmakers came off session lows and oil prices jumped on the escalation of the US-Iran war. Traders are also bracing for key earnings from Alphabet Inc., Tesla Inc. and International Business Machines Corp. due later in the afternoon.

title: Alphabet Earnings Need to Show Cloud Growth as AI Spending Soars
title_cn: 随着人工智能支出飙升，Alphabet 的盈利需要显示云计算的增长
summary: With AI spending skyrocketing, investors are looking for Alphabet Inc.’s earnings to show strong growth in its cloud-computing business, which would demonstrate a clear return on the company’s investments.

title: QatarEnergy Prepares to Extend LNG Force Majeure Into October
title_cn: 卡塔尔能源公司准备将液化天然气不可抗力延长至十月
summary: QatarEnergy is preparing to further extend force majeure on liquefied natural gas shipments through mid-October, according to people with knowledge of the matter, in a move that would prolong the supply shock that has disrupted the global gas market amid war in the Middle East.

title: Aston Martin Raises £550 Million Debt From HPS to Boost Cash
title_cn: 阿斯顿·马丁从 HPS 筹集 5.5 亿英镑债务以增加现金
summary: Aston Martin Lagonda Global Holdings Plc has struck a deal for £550 million ($736 million) of fresh funds with BlackRock Inc.-owned HPS Investment Partners to bolster its liquidity.

title: Prologis Wins Segro Backing for £14 Billion Takeover
title_cn: Prologis 获得 Segro 支持以 140 亿英镑收购
summary: Prologis Inc. is set to acquire the UK’s largest landlord Segro Plc after securing the recommendation of its board for an improved £14 billion ($18.7 billion) cash and share offer for the company.

title: Japan May Move to Managing Yields, Not Yen, Deutsche Bank Says
title_cn: 德意志银行表示，日本可能会转向管理收益率，而不是日元
summary: Japan may have to shift its focus from supporting the yen toward controlling government bond yields if it is to achieve its ambitious economic growth plans, according to Deutsche Bank AG.

title: BofA Equities Traders Say Buy Momentum Stocks, Eyeing 5% Gain
title_cn: 美国银行股票交易员称买入动量股，目标是上涨 5%
summary: Bank of America Corp.’s trading desk is urging clients to buy US momentum stocks, betting that the group has reached an attractive price level after a bout of profit taking.

title: OpenAI President Says Kimi K3 ‘Pretty Good,’ Unsure If Distilled
title_cn: OpenAI 总裁表示 Kimi K3“非常好”，但不确定是否经过提炼
summary: OpenAI President Greg Brockman acknowledged that Moonshot AI had developed a competitive new artificial intelligence model and said he wasn’t sure whether the Chinese firm had piggybacked on the ChatGPT maker’s technology.

title: OpenAI’s Brockman on New ChatGPT Era After ‘Tough’ Year of Cuts: Q&A
title_cn: OpenAI 的 Brockman 谈经历“艰难”的削减一年后的新 ChatGPT 时代：问答

title_cn: 特斯拉 (TSLA) 收益：2026 年第二季度实时业绩，埃隆·马斯克评论

summary: Meta Platforms Inc. won’t have to face a second trial over claims that social media platforms are addictive to minors because the plaintiff is dismissing the case, according to his lawyers.

title: OpenAI Models Breach Hugging Face, Sparking Cyber Alarms

summary: Since April, when Anthropic PBC unveiled its Mythos model, cyber and national security experts have warned that the internet has entered a new era full of artificial intelligence-powered risks.

title_cn: OpenAI 模型成功破解拥抱脸部，验证网络警告
summary: “Sandbox” testing environments are meant to isolate risky cyber threats.

title_cn: 白宫官员称 Moonshot 访问了被禁的 Nvidia 芯片
summary: A White House official accused China’s Moonshot of improperly using US AI models and Nvidia Corp. chips to create the Kimi K3 system that stunned the tech industry last week with its advanced capabilities.

title: Revolut Confirms $115 Billion Valuation in Latest Share Sale
title_cn: Revolut 确认最新股票出售估值为 1,150 亿美元
summary: Revolut Ltd. has kicked off a process for some employees to sell their shares in the company at a valuation of $115 billion, less than a year after it nabbed a valuation of $75 billion through a similar effort.

title: French Social Media Ban Kicks Off Wave of New Rules in the EU
title_cn: 法国社交媒体禁令引发欧盟新规浪潮
summary: After months of debates across the continent, France became the first European Union member to ban social media for young teenagers this week, kicking off what’s set to be a wave of new regulations and pressuring the bloc to find a unified approach toward the big tech platforms.

title_cn: Meta 从 Qualtrics 和 PayPal 任命新首席安全官
summary: Meta Platforms Inc. tapped a veteran cybersecurity executive to serve as its next chief information security officer, filling a key opening after its former CISO announced plans to depart last month.

title: Super Micro Gains the Most Since 2024 After Order Backlog Grows
title_cn: 订单积压增长后，Super Micro 实现 2024 年以来最大涨幅
summary: Super Micro Computer Inc. shares rose as much as 25% after the server maker issued preliminary results saying its backlog hit a record on new orders in the quarter of more than $60 billion.

title_cn: 罗杰斯击败不断壮大的体育帝国带来更多意外之财
summary: Rogers Communications Inc. beat analysts’ earnings expectations on continued strength in its sports assets.

title: Israel Plans Crocodile-Infested Moats to Guard Hamas Prisoners

summary: Israeli authorities are planning to use crocodile-filled moats to guard high-security Hamas prisoners, arguing that it saves money and treats those inmates in the way they deserve.

summary: Apple Inc. is readying an overhaul of its Mac line, seeking to capitalize on demand for powerful laptops and desktops fueled by the artificial intelligence boom.

title_cn: 人工智能借款人正在将利基信贷市场推向极限
summary: Data center developer PolarDC Group Ltd. discovered an unlikely source of cash for its AI ambitions back in May: the Nordic high-yield bond market.

title: Samsung Says Smart Glasses Privacy Concerns Need Industrywide Fix
title_cn: 三星表示智能眼镜的隐私问题需要全行业解决
summary: Samsung Electronics Co. showcased the smart glasses it developed in partnership with Alphabet Inc.’s Google, Warby Parker and Gentle Monster, offering new details around battery life and durability ahead of a release this fall.

title: OpenAI Plans to Spend Over $30 Billion on Georgia Data Center
title_cn: OpenAI 计划斥资超过 300 亿美元建设乔治亚数据中心
summary: OpenAI plans to spend tens of billions of dollars on a massive new data center near Savannah, Georgia as part of the ChatGPT maker’s push to keep up with surging demand for artificial intelligence software.

title: Samsung Revamps Foldable Lineup With Galaxy Z Fold 8, Z Fold 8 Ultra, Z Flip 8
title_cn: 三星更新可折叠产品阵容，推出 Galaxy Z Fold 8、Z Fold 8 Ultra、Z Flip 8
summary: The Galaxy Z Fold 8 has a more squat design that was built for consuming video.

title: Nintendo Scores Hit With Tomodachi Life as Gamers Seek Escape With Life Sims
title_cn: 任天堂《Tomodachi Life》大获成功，玩家纷纷通过《Life Sims》寻求逃离
summary: Six years after Nintendo Co.’s Animal Crossing: New Horizons became a lockdown phenomenon, the company is scoring another major hit worldwide from gamers seeking an escape from rising anxiety and isolation.

title: Secret Service Sees Record Threats Before Correspondents Dinner
title_cn: 特勤局在记者晚宴前看到创纪录的威胁
summary: The US Secret Service is preparing to secure a rescheduled White House Correspondents’ Association dinner on Friday amid what its director called the highest threat level of his 24-year career, three months after a shooting disrupted the association’s original gala.

title: Crypto Bill Heads for High-Stakes Senate Vote As Democrats Balk
title_cn: 民主党犹豫不决，加密货币法案将在参议院进行高风险投票
summary: Senate Majority Leader John Thune is planning a vote on crypto market structure legislation as soon as next week despite Democratic criticism that the bill would do little to curb President Donald Trump’s rapidly accumulating crypto wealth.

title: Maduro Trial Date Set for June 2027 in US Drug-Trafficking Case
title_cn: 美国贩毒案马杜罗审判日期定于 2027 年 6 月
summary: Nicolás Maduro appeared in court for the first time since March as a judge set a June 1, 2027, date for the ousted Venezuelan leader’s trial in a US drug-trafficking and narco-terrorism conspiracy case.

title: Russian Fuel Crunch Eases as Ukraine Shifts Focus of Attacks
title_cn: 随着乌克兰转移攻击焦点，俄罗斯燃料短缺状况有所缓解
summary: Russian regions are cautiously reporting an easing of a gasoline crisis after Ukraine’s military shifted the focus of its attacks from major oil refineries to ships.

title: India Students Push On With Protests as Parliament Deadlocks
title_cn: 印度议会陷入僵局，学生继续抗议
summary: Indian students and opposition leaders kept up pressure on the country’s education minister to resign, with a deadlock in the parliament for a third day as large crowds of protesters gathered nearby.

title: Trump’s 100% Generic Drug Duty Threatens US Low-Cost Supply
title_cn: 特朗普100%仿制药关税威胁美国低成本供应
summary: Generic drug manufacturers must move production to the US or face a 100% import duty from August 2028, President Donald Trump said, threatening the supply of low-cost medicines that millions of Americans rely on.

title: China Foreign Minister Gets Protest From Manila in First Talks Since 2024
title_cn: 中国外长2024年以来首次会谈遭到马尼拉抗议
summary: China and the Philippines exchanged “strong” protests in the wake of a recent clash in the disputed South China Sea, delivered in the first sit-down between the two nations’ foreign ministers since 2024.

title: SEC Agrees to Pay $150,000 to End Coinbase Suit Over Records
title_cn: SEC 同意支付 15 万美元以结束 Coinbase 记录诉讼
summary: The US Securities and Exchange Commission agreed to pay $150,000 in legal fees to end Coinbase Global Inc.’s 2024 lawsuit seeking internal documents on the regulator’s Biden-era crackdown on the cryptocurrency industry.

title: Chinese Autos Face US Ban Under Bill Moved by Senate Panel
title_cn: 根据参议院小组提出的法案，中国汽车面临美国禁令
summary: Bipartisan legislation approved Wednesday by the Senate Commerce Committee would effectively ban Chinese vehicles from the US market.

title: Maine Democrat Leads Collins in First Poll Post-Platner Exit
title_cn: 缅因州民主党人在普拉特纳退出后的首次民意调查中领先柯林斯
summary: What was set to be a messy capstone to a frenzied primary process has now become a coronation ceremony for Troy Jackson, a progressive former Maine lawmaker who so effectively out-organized his opponents that he locked up the Democratic nomination in a must-win US Senate race a week early.

title: ICE Accelerates Immigration Arrests Across US to 1,400 a Day
title_cn: ICE 将全美范围内的移民逮捕数量加快至每天 1,400 人
summary: Department of Homeland Security Secretary Markwayne Mullin is ramping up immigration arrests, ending a spring lull that followed the shooting deaths of two US citizens by federal agents.

title: Kremlin Hardens Stance on Occupied Ukrainian Land, Blames US
title_cn: 克里姆林宫在被占领的乌克兰土地上强化立场，指责美国
summary: Russia is no longer willing to return some occupied territories to Ukraine as part of any deal to end the war and plans to retain them as buffer zones, according to people close to the Kremlin.

title: Conservatives Urge UK Tax Authorities to Probe Farage ‘Gift’
title_cn: 保守派敦促英国税务机关调查法拉奇的“礼物”
summary: The Conservative Party is urging tax authorities to investigate whether Reform UK leader Nigel Farage should have paid a multimillion pound tax bill on an undeclared gift of £5 million ($6.7 million) he received from a donor.

title: Hegseth Turns to UNC, Virginia Tech After Dropping Ivy League
title_cn: 赫格斯在放弃常春藤盟校后转向北卡罗来纳大学、弗吉尼亚理工大学
summary: The Department of Defense approved the University of North Carolina at Chapel Hill and Virginia Tech for a fellowship for senior military officers, after Secretary Pete Hegseth dropped partnerships with elite universities.

title: US, Iran Suggest Peace Talks Aren’t Imminent as Attacks Widen
title_cn: 美国和伊朗表示，随着袭击范围扩大，和谈不会立即进行
summary: The US and Iran signaled they aren’t ready to return to the negotiating table after both countries escalated attacks deep into a second week of renewed fighting.

title: Zelenskyy Ousts Top Army Chief in Tilt Toward Reformers
title_cn: 泽连斯基罢免陆军最高司令，倾向改革派
summary: Ukrainian President Volodymyr Zelenskyy dismissed Armed Forces Commander-in-Chief Oleksandr Syrskyi in a major military shakeup, yielding to nationwide anger sparked by his ouster of a popular defense minister.

title: Cuba’s Population Decline Deepens With Deaths Outpacing Births
title_cn: 古巴人口下降加剧，死亡人数超过出生人数
summary: Cuba’s population collapse continued unabated last year, as births declined and people continued to flee an island that’s being crushed by an economic crisis and US sanctions.

title: Trump Pauses $1 Billion in Medicaid Funds From Two States
title_cn: 特朗普暂停向两个州提供 10 亿美元医疗补助资金
summary: The Trump administration will withhold more than $1 billion in Medicaid payments to California and Minnesota after an audit indicated instances of fraud in the federal health program.

title: Trump Takes Another Swing at Drug Industry in Made-in-USA Push
title_cn: 特朗普在推动美国制造方面再次向制药行业发起冲击
summary: President Donald Trump’s threat of 100% tariffs against generic medicines is a major expansion of a strategy he’s been using against the pharmaceutical industry since his second term began.

title: India Pushes China for Better Market Access, Trade Balance
title_cn: 印度敦促中国改善市场准入和贸易平衡
summary: India pressed China for better market access, predictable supply chains and steps to narrow the widening trade imbalance, as the two countries look to stabilize ties after years of border tensions.
